title: phyllanthus involutus
intro: Phyllanthus involutus, also known as the Indian gooseberry or emblic, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Phyllanthus involutus is believed to have various health benefits, such as supporting immune function, reducing oxidative stress, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and powders, can be used to make teas, capsules, and other supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
